description: Biome tile configuration for BiomeRenderer — 10 individual 142×142 PNGs

desert.label: Desert
desert.description: Hot, dry sandy terrain with minimal vegetation

forest.label: Forest
forest.description: Dense temperate woodland with mixed canopy

grasslands.label: Grasslands
grasslands.description: Open grassy plains with low seasonal rainfall

jungle.label: Jungle
jungle.description: Dense tropical rainforest with high humidity

mountains.label: Mountains
mountains.description: Rocky high-altitude terrain with exposed ridgelines

mountains_snow_covered.label: Snow-Capped Mountains
mountains_snow_covered.description: High-altitude peaks with permanent ice and snowpack

ocean.label: Ocean
ocean.description: Deep open water, saltwater or alien equivalent

plains.label: Plains
plains.description: Flat low-elevation terrain with sparse ground cover

swamp.label: Swamp
swamp.description: Saturated lowland terrain with stagnant water and dense reeds

tundra.label: Tundra
tundra.description: Cold treeless biome with permafrost and low ground cover
